evidence_refs: CT-1: src/brand/styles/tokens.css carries the brandbook-derived theme color/surface/text token values (REQ-FP-D08 brandbook values source). CT-1 removed pure-white offenders (--theme-surface-void, --theme-dropdown-bg, --background/--card/--popover), added --theme-text-secondary, and added contrast-safe --theme-accent-text per brandbook 'no pure white/black' interpretation contract.
